title: News-sentiment signal
question: Does news sentiment predict forward returns, or just react to past ones — and does it depend on company size?
finding: Reactive, and the mirror is sharpest in small caps. Across 9,762 model-tagged posts on 211 names split into 4 cap buckets, sentiment tracks the prior 20-day return (clustered IC +0.145) ~3x more strongly than the matched forward 20-day (+0.049), and that backward link falls monotonically with size (Small +0.244 to Mega +0.065). The forward flicker is mostly momentum in disguise (+0.049 to +0.010 once momentum is removed) and the tradable long-short spread is statistically zero (+0.38%, CI [-0.45%, +1.19%]). A momentum mirror, not an entry signal.
